notes: Generated model catalog for the resolver (resolver-policy.yml: catalog_format=external-json). Concrete model IDs live only here and in the derived route lockfile, never in skill bodies. smoke_eval is evidence-backed: flip pending->passed only with a recorded supervised run (see evidence fields).

evidence: plans/20260705-structure-gates.md Outcomes: logstat A/B implementation runs (worker, focused_code_edit)
plans/20260705-sonnet5-executable.md Outcomes: blind routing smoke eval 9/10 (explorer/judge)
plans/20260705-skill-contract-infra.md Outcomes: WS6/WS7 scoped edit runs with escalation-on-scope-boundary
reports/skillset-review-20260705.md and Phase 1-3 PRs (#80-#82): supervision, threshold design, judge verification of all delegated runs

models.smoke_procedure: Run one supervised task per claimed profile in Claude Code with model claude-opus-4-8 (e.g. supervise a scoped worker edit and judge its run record); record the run via scripts/agent_run.py --harness claude-code, then set smoke_eval to passed with the run evidence listed here and regenerate the route lockfile.
